creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed, thanks!

BTW: Moving plist files into pkg-plist was not yet absolutely necessary, since up to six files may remain in the Makefile per PLIST_FILES:

#portlint -AC
WARN: /poudriere/ports/default/sysutils/bfs/pkg-plist: There are only 3 items in the plist.  Consider using PLIST_FILES instead of pkg-plist when installing less than 6 items.

But it's the maintainer's decision in the end, and for me it's OK like this ;)
